MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kadeidra Honey for Mechanics Bank.

Ms. Honey provided courtesy copies of what was filed on January 13, 2020 and a new proposed order. The First and Final Report of Executor on Waiver of Account, etc. is continued to April 1, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: J. Singh. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kadeidra Honey for Mechanics Bank (Petitioner).

Ms. Honey provide courtesy copies of a response to the Probate Examiner's notes and a declaration that were filed on Friday (12/13/19). Ms. Honey also stated that she has a second declaration, but it is not filed yet. The First and Final Report of Executor on Waiver of Account, etc. is under submission. Ms. Honey is to provide a courtesy copy of the second declaration by Friday.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
